channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RAJTV] Raj Television: M Ravindran acquires 2.7% shares in inter-se transfer
item.description:
M Ravindran acquired 1,400,000 equity shares, representing 2.6968% of Raj Television Network Ltd, from Mrs. K Vijayalakshmi on March 25, 2026. This off-market transaction is an inter-se transfer between members of the promoter group and is claimed to be exempt under Regulation 10(1)(a)(ii) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The aggregate shareholding of the Promoter and Promoter Group remains unchanged after this acquisition. A non-refundable fee of ₹1,77,000 (including GST) was remitted to SEBI for this disclosure.

  • M Ravindran acquired 2.6968% equity shares of Raj Television Network.
  • The acquisition was an off-market inter-se transfer within the promoter group.
  • Transaction is exempt under SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
  • Promoter group's aggregate shareholding remains unchanged post-transfer.
  • Disclosure filed with SEBI, including a ₹1,77,000 fee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAJ TELEVISION NETWORK LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [LTTS] LTTS partners with global energy major for 500-engineer digital center
item.description:
🔥 Trending

L&T Technology Services (LTTS) has announced a partnership with a leading global energy major. Under this agreement, LTTS will serve as the engineering services and technology partner for the energy major's Digital Expertise centre in India. The collaboration is expected to involve approximately 500 engineers, leveraging LTTS's expertise in AI, Digital, and ER&D Consulting Services. This partnership signifies a significant project win for LTTS and reinforces its position in the energy sector, indicating potential for revenue growth and expansion of its service offerings.

  • LTTS partners with a leading global energy major.
  • Will provide engineering and technology services for a digital center.
  • The partnership involves approximately 500 engineers.
  • Strengthens LTTS's presence in the energy sector.
  • Highlights demand for AI, Digital, and ER&D consulting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: L&T Technology Services Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [KIAASA] Kiaasa Retail CFO Sumit Agrawal Resigns, Effective April 2026
item.description:
Kiaasa Retail Limited announced the resignation of Mr. Sumit Agrawal from the post of Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP). His resignation will be effective from the close of business hours on April 30, 2026. The company stated that Mr. Agrawal's decision is due to personal reasons, specifically his relocation to his native place to take care of his family. The filing confirms there are no other material reasons for his resignation. Mr. Agrawal expressed gratitude for his tenure and committed to ensuring a smooth transition of his responsibilities.

  • Kiaasa Retail's CFO, Sumit Agrawal, has resigned from his position.
  • The resignation is effective from April 30, 2026.
  • Reasons cited are personal and relocation to his native place for family care.
  • The company confirmed no other material reasons for his departure.
  • Mr. Agrawal committed to a smooth transition of his responsibilities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kiaasa Retail Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SHAILY] SMALLCAP World Fund increases stake in Shaily Engg to 7.62%
item.description:
SMALLCAP World Fund, Inc. has increased its shareholding in Shaily Engineering Plastics Limited through an open market acquisition. The fund acquired an additional 983,425 shares, representing 2.1400% of the company's total share capital. This transaction, which took place on April 15, 2026, has raised SMALLCAP World Fund, Inc.'s total stake from 5.4816% (2,519,092 shares) to 7.6216% (3,502,517 shares) of Shaily Engineering Plastics Limited's equity. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • SMALLCAP World Fund, Inc. increased its stake in Shaily Engineering Plastics.
  • The fund acquired an additional 2.14% through open market purchases.
  • Total holding now stands at 7.62% of the company's equity.
  • This indicates increased institutional investor confidence in the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHAILY ENGINEERING PLASTICS LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [DPABHUSHAN] D.P. Abhushan Promoters Dispose of 400,000 Equity Shares
item.description:
D.P. Abhushan Ltd's promoter group, including Vikas Kataria HUF, Santosh Ratanlal Kataria HUF, and Persons Acting in Concert (PACs), disclosed the disposal of 400,000 equity shares. This transaction was conducted as an inter-se transfer. Prior to this disposal, the promoter group held a combined 17,095,469 shares, representing 74.89% of the company's total share/voting capital. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Vikas Kataria HUF had also sought pre-clearance for the sale of 200,000 shares via an off-market transaction.

  • Promoter group disposed of 400,000 equity shares of D.P. Abhushan Ltd.
  • The transaction was an inter-se transfer among HUFs and PACs.
  • Disclosure was made under SEBI SAST Regulation 29(2).
  • Promoter group held 74.89% of shares before the disposal.
  • Vikas Kataria HUF sought pre-clearance for 200,000 shares sale.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: D.P. Abhushan Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [DPABHUSHAN] DP Abhushan: Vikas Kataria Acquires 4 Lakh Shares via Inter-Se Transfer
item.description:
Vikas Kataria and Persons Acting in Concert (PACs) have acquired 400,000 equity shares of D.P. Abhushan Limited through an off-market inter-se transfer. This transaction involved shareholders belonging to the Promoter and Promoter's Group. The disclosure, made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, indicates that the overall shareholding percentage of the promoter group remains unchanged at 74.89% both before and after this acquisition. The transaction was completed on March 16, 2026.

  • Vikas Kataria acquired 400,000 equity shares of D.P. Abhushan Limited.
  • The acquisition was an off-market inter-se transfer within the promoter group.
  • The promoter group's total shareholding remains 74.89% post-transaction.
  • The transaction was disclosed under SEBI Takeover Regulations, 2011.
  • The acquisition date was March 16, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: D.P. Abhushan Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [HRMNYCP] Dorni Vinimoy acquires 29.27% stake in Harmony Capital via Preferential Allotment
item.description:
Dorni Vinimoy Pvt Ltd has acquired 35,50,000 equity shares, representing 29.27% of Harmony Capital Services Limited's total share capital. The acquisition took place on April 15, 2026, through a combination of preferential allotment and an open offer. Dorni Vinimoy Pvt Ltd is identified as belonging to the promoter group. This transaction significantly increases their holding in Harmony Capital, and the target company's equity share capital increased from 30,00,900 to 1,21,26,900 shares post-acquisition.

  • Dorni Vinimoy Pvt Ltd acquired 29.27% stake in Harmony Capital.
  • The acquisition involved 35,50,000 equity shares of Rs. 10 each.
  • The transaction was executed via Preferential Allotment and Open offer.
  • Dorni Vinimoy Pvt Ltd is part of the promoter group.
  • Harmony Capital's equity capital increased to 1,21,26,900 shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HARMONY CAPITAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [THAKRAL] Thakral Services Board to meet on May 4, 2026 for FY26 results
item.description:
Thakral Services India Ltd. has informed BSE that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Monday, May 4, 2026, at 4:30 P.M. in Bangalore. The main purpose of this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for both the quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. This announcement is made in accordance with Regulation 29 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 4, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Audited Financial Results.
  • Results are for Q4 and full year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Meeting held in Bangalore at 4:30 P.M.
  • Notice complies with SEBI (LODR) Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THAKRAL SERVICES (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DPABHUSHAN] D.P. Abhushan: Promoters transfer 400,000 shares inter-se
item.description:
Santosh Kataria and Vikas Kataria, belonging to the promoter group of D.P. Abhushan Limited, acquired 400,000 equity shares of the company. This transaction was an off-market inter-se transfer from Santosh Ratanlal Kataria HUF and Vikas Ratanlal Kataria HUF, also part of the promoter group. The acquisition took place on February 12, 2026. Following this internal transfer, the overall shareholding of the promoter and promoter group in D.P. Abhushan Limited remains unchanged at 17,095,469 shares, representing 74.89% of the total equity share capital.

  • D.P. Abhushan promoters acquired 400,000 shares via inter-se transfer.
  • Santosh Kataria and Vikas Kataria were the acquirers in this transaction.
  • The transfer was an off-market transaction completed on February 12, 2026.
  • Promoter group's total shareholding percentage remains unchanged at 74.89%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: D.P. Abhushan Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [AUROPHARMA] Aurobindo Pharma gets USFDA nod for Glycerol Phenylbutyrate Oral Liquid
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aurobindo Pharma Ltd has received final approval from the US FDA to manufacture and market Glycerol Phenylbutyrate Oral Liquid, 1.1 grams per mL. This product is bioequivalent and therapeutically equivalent to Ravicti Oral Liquid of Horizon Therapeutics. The drug, indicated for chronic management of urea cycle disorders, will be manufactured by the company's Unit-III and launched immediately. The estimated market size for this product was US$ 50.2 million for the twelve months ending February 2026. This approval increases Aurobindo Pharma's total USFDA ANDA approvals to 579.

  • Aurobindo Pharma received USFDA approval for Glycerol Phenylbutyrate Oral Liquid.
  • The approved product is bioequivalent to Ravicti Oral Liquid.
  • Estimated market size for the drug is US$ 50.2 million.
  • Product will be manufactured by Unit-III and launched immediately.
  • Total USFDA ANDA approvals for Aurobindo Pharma reach 579.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUROBINDO PHARMA LTD. | Category: USFDA
